transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete animal and shopping examples give the argument texture, but repeated questions, typographic shouting, promotional assurances, and a long medical detour exhaust the initial momentum before a boilerplate recap.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete animal and shopping examples give the argument texture, but repeated questions, typographic shouting, promotional assurances, and a long medical detour exhaust the initial momentum before a boilerplate recap.

parsed.generic_mechanism: There is no craft difference: identical sequencing, examples, rhetorical patterns, and recap structure create the same strengths and the same drag.
